subject: Social Sciences
title: Colonial Era
tagline: Understand the impact of colonization on Southern Africa!

steps.label: Arrival
steps.description: European settlers arrive at the Cape in 1652.

steps.label: Expansion
steps.description: Settlers expand inland, taking more land.

steps.label: Conflict
steps.description: Conflict grows between settlers and indigenous groups.

steps.label: British Rule
steps.description: British rule replaces Dutch rule at the Cape.

steps.label: Trekboers
steps.description: Trekboers and Voortrekkers move further inland.

steps.label: Colonies Form
steps.description: Separate colonies form across southern Africa.
